business.name: Canyon Wheelworks
business.summary: A planning guide inspired by bicycle repair shop. Service and availability details are not confirmed.

needs: Reliable help with everyday bicycle problems

offerings.name: Commuter bicycle repair
offerings.description: Neighborhood repair service for bicycles used by local commuters.

offerings.name: Walk in service
offerings.description: Riders are welcome to bring bicycles in without a scheduled appointment.

offerings.name: Flat tire repair
offerings.description: Likely support for common tire and tube problems.

offerings.name: Brake and gear adjustment
offerings.description: Likely adjustment service for common braking and shifting issues.

offerings.name: Routine maintenance
offerings.description: Likely maintenance for bicycles used in regular travel.

brand.voice: Plainspoken and useful, with an emphasis on helping local riders understand their next step.
brand.aesthetic: A workshop inspired layout with warm desert colors, strong typography, simple line drawings, and visible mechanical details. Services appear in one clear list rather than a grid of decorative cards.

signatureMove.name: The Service Wheel
signatureMove.description: A simple bicycle wheel illustration sits beside the service list. Moving across a service highlights one spoke while the full service text remains visible.
signatureMove.touchFallback: On touch devices, the wheel remains static and each service is paired with a clearly marked spoke.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: When reduced motion is enabled, the wheel does not rotate. Services use a simple color change for focus and selection.

content.headline: Explore Ideas
content.subheadline: A practical starting point for considering bicycle repair shop before confirming details with the business.
content.about: Use these notes to clarify priorities, setting, and personal preferences before confirming details.

confirmed.label: Owner details
confirmed.value: Neighborhood bicycle repair for commuters. Walk in service is welcome.

inferred.label: Likely services
inferred.value: Flat tire repair, brake and gear adjustment, and routine maintenance

inferred.label: Brand direction
inferred.value: Practical neighborhood workshop with a warm desert inspired visual style
